market_context: U.S. stock futures are slightly positive ahead of the market open, with the S&P 500 futures up 0.16% and the Dow Jones futures up 0.16%. Investors are awaiting key economic data releases today, including retail sales and jobless claims, which could influence market direction.

predictions.reasoning: With S&P 500 futures indicating a modest gain and upcoming retail sales data expected to show a 0.3% month-over-month increase, SPY is likely to close higher today.
Chip stocks have been under pressure recently, and with no immediate positive catalysts, NVDA may experience a slight decline by the end of the day.
AAPL has shown resilience in recent sessions, and with a positive market sentiment, it is likely to close higher today.
Bitcoin has been trading in a tight range, and with a slight positive bias in the broader market, it may edge higher by the end of the day.
